name: World horror story
short_description: World Horror Story is a cooperative survival horror game where you need to banish evil before it destroys you. In the game, you can communicate with ghosts and demons using your voice, but be careful; if ghosts respond, it doesn't mean they are friendly.
detailed_description:
Immerse Yourself in a World of True Terror
Explore sinister locations, solve intriguing puzzles, and survive in a realm where darkness comes to life. Realistic graphics and a meticulously designed soundscape create an atmosphere where every creak and whisper makes your heart race.

Key Features:

  • Interactive Communication with the Ghost:
    Experience the power of direct contact with the otherworldly. Converse with the witch’s ghost using voice or text in four languages (English, Chinese, Spanish, and Russian). The locally-run LLM not only responds with a real voice but also can influence in-game events—from sudden lighting changes to triggering unexpected jump scares or initiating a chase.

  • Multiplayer Co-op:
    Gather a team of friends and explore a variety of grim locations—from mysterious foggy forests to cursed houses and abandoned schools. Only teamwork and quick reflexes will help you overcome all obstacles on the path to survival.

  • Deep Story and Atmospheric Narration:
    World Horror Story was conceived as a collection of engaging horror tales, where every location harbors its own secrets and the unfolding events are woven together by a mystical thread. Your actions and interactions with the supernatural shape a unique story in which the past and present intertwine in the most unexpected ways.

  • Dynamic Gameplay and Puzzles:
    Every playthrough is a unique challenge, filled with unpredictable events and a vibrant atmosphere. Diverse puzzles and randomly generated elements ensure that each session is truly special, demanding attention and clever thinking.

Are you ready to step into a game where every word matters?
Discover a world where fear becomes tangible and your decisions are the key to survival. World Horror Story invites you to the brink between reality and nightmare—a realm where the boundaries between life and death are blurred, and every step could be your last.

Immerse yourself in World Horror Story and experience how innovative AI integration takes horror games to a whole new level!

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain*, Bulgarian, Portuguese - Brazil, Hungarian, Vietnamese, Greek, Danish, Indonesian, Spanish - Latin America, Traditional Chinese, Simplified Chinese*, Korean, Dutch, Norwegian, Polish, Portuguese - Portugal, Romanian, Russian*, Thai, Turkish, Ukrainian, Finnish, Czech, Swedish, Japanese
*languages with full audio support
